stemHtml: Per ICAO Doc 4444, how is lateral separation achieved between aircraft using the same navigation aid on specified tracks?

options.a: The tracks must be separated by the minimum amount appropriate to the navigation aid in use.
options.b: Both aircraft must be on VOR radials diverging by at least 25° with one at 5 NM or more from the aid.
options.c: Both aircraft must be on tracks diverging by at least 15° from an NDB with one at 10 NM or more from the facility.
options.d: Visual observation must confirm a lateral distance of at least 10 NM.
